raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding incorrect refund processing and excessive delay by Macys. 

I purchased three printers : Printer # XXXX : Order # XXXX Purchased on : XXXX XXXX, XXXX, Paid : {$280.00}, Refunded on XXXX XXXX, XXXX Printer # 2 : Order # XXXX Purchased on : XXXX XXXX, XXXX, Paid : {$280.00}, Refunded on XXXX XXXX, XXXX Printer # 3 : Order # XXXX - Purchased on : XXXX XXXX, XXXX, applied {$80.00} in Star Money ( earned from Printer # 1 and # 2 promotions ) and credit card paid {$190.00}, Partial Refunded {$240.00} on XXXX XXXX, XXXX All three were received as refurbished, despite not being clearly disclosed in the product title or main description. 

I returned all three printers. 

The issue is that Macys processed the refunds incorrectly. 

For XXXX # XXXX, I was only refunded {$240.00}. {$40.00} was deducted improperly. 

For XXXX # XXXX, only the XXXX  XXXX amount was refunded, refund {$190.00} and the {$80.00} XXXX XXXX was not restored. 

Regardless of promotional rewards, a refund must equal the exact amount charged to the credit card. 

I have contacted Macys customer service more than 10 times ( via chat and phone ). I was promised follow-up emails within XXXX hours, which were never sent. 

This matter remains unresolved, and I am requesting : Full refund of the exact charged amounts Macys has failed to correct the incorrect refund despite repeated good-faith efforts on my part. 

I am requesting regulatory review and assistance.
